column1: Full page cache has been flushed.
column2: Full page cache has been flushed.

column1: When enabled, cacheable pages are saved as static HTML and served without PHP.
column2: When enabled, cacheable pages are saved as static HTML and served without PHP.

column1: Seconds before cached pages expire. Default: 86400 (24 hours).
column2: Seconds before cached pages expire. Default: 86400 (24 hours).

column1: Cache-Control max-age in seconds for CDN layer. Default: 60.
column2: Cache-Control max-age in seconds for CDN layer. Default: 60.

column1: Add X-FPC-Age response header showing cache entry age in seconds.
column2: Add X-FPC-Age response header showing cache entry age in seconds.

column1: One full action name per line (e.g. catalog_product_view). Only these actions will be cached.
column2: One full action name per line (e.g. catalog_product_view). Only these actions will be cached.

column1: One per line: name:selector:mode (e.g. cart_count:[data-cart-count]:text). Mode is text or html.
column2: One per line: name:selector:mode (e.g. cart_count:[data-cart-count]:text). Mode is text or html.

column1: Block names to render lazily via AJAX (one per line). These blocks are removed from cached HTML and loaded client-side.
column2: Block names to render lazily via AJAX (one per line). These blocks are removed from cached HTML and loaded client-side.

column1: One handle per line. Pages with these handles will never be cached.
column2: One handle per line. Pages with these handles will never be cached.

column1: Query parameters included in cache key (one per line). All others are stripped.
column2: Query parameters included in cache key (one per line). All others are stripped.

column1: Query parameters always stripped before cache key (one per line). UTM, gclid, etc.
column2: Query parameters always stripped before cache key (one per line). UTM, gclid, etc.

column1: Include customer group in cache key. Different cached versions per group.
column2: Include customer group in cache key. Different cached versions per group.
